description_long: This is a plush toy designed to resemble a cartoon mouse, featuring a rounded body covered in a light tan fabric with a slightly textured, woven appearance. The toy has two large, circular ears that protrude from the top of its head, and a smaller, rounded snout with a subtle nose. Its face is adorned with two oval-shaped black eyes, giving it a simple and friendly expression. The belly and inner ears are made from a lighter beige fabric, providing visual contrast to the rest of the body. The arms and legs are short and stubby, sewn onto the sides and lower part of the body, respectively. The overall construction suggests a soft, squeezable form, typical of stuffed animals found in parks, playgrounds, or urban play areas.
description: A soft, tan plush mouse toy with large round ears, black oval eyes, and a lighter beige belly and inner ears. Its simple, friendly design features short arms and legs and a rounded, squeezable body.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the large round ears, rounded body, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the protruding snout, the thickness of the body, and the positioning of the limbs.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the symmetrical face with black oval eyes, lighter belly patch, and both arms and legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the other ear, snout, and the curvature of the back and limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with large black oval eyes and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a calm and approachable appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly outstretched and legs apart, head facing forward.
